chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-3592/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 14.10.2024 Mr. Rafiq Ahmed advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Altaf Ahmed Shar, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Irshad Ahmed Shaikh, AAG................ Mr. Zahoorul- Hussain Sangi advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, taken on record. 2. Heard, perused the record. 3. Petitioner No.1 is claiming marriage with petitioner No.2 whereas private respondent Jahangir filed suit for jactitation of marriage which culminated by judgment dated 22.12.2023 whereby suit was dismissed. Claim of the respondent is that petitioner No.1 contracted marriage when she was already in marriage with him; that aspect cannot be decided in criminal jurisdiction until declaration is sought and candidly such declaration is answered as negative; besides prosecutrix’s evidence through statement has been brought on record through I/O wherein she has negated the offence under section 452 and 265-B PPC in Crime No.106/2023, PS Sarhad, District Ghotki hence proceedings thereof are hereby quashed. Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
